problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
